questions.question: Explain CSS Troubleshooting Part 6C and its primary use case in CSS.
questions.answer: CSS Troubleshooting Part 6C provides a structured mechanism to handle core application logic cleanly.

questions.question: What are common mistakes developers make with CSS Troubleshooting Part 6C?
questions.answer: Common issues include scoping errors, unhandled boundary cases, and improper resource cleanup.

questions.question: How does the CSS runtime optimize CSS Troubleshooting Part 6C under the hood?
questions.answer: The runtime engine uses symbol tables, call stack frames, and bytecode optimization to run instructions efficiently.
